name: io.github.verygoodplugins/mcp-pirsch
title: MCP Pirsch
description: Pirsch Analytics with natural language queries and trend analysis

tools.name: pirsch_list_domains
tools.description: List all domains in your Pirsch account

tools.name: pirsch_overview
tools.description: Get the cached overview snapshot for a domain; filters do not apply

tools.name: pirsch_total
tools.description: Get total visitors, views, sessions, bounce rate, conversion rate, and custom metrics

tools.name: pirsch_goals
tools.description: Get conversion goals and their performance

tools.name: pirsch_event_pages
tools.description: Get pages on which a specific event fired

tools.name: pirsch_growth
tools.description: Get growth rates for key metrics

tools.name: pirsch_sessions
tools.description: Get session list with entry, exit, and device/source details

tools.name: pirsch_session_details
tools.description: Get the full page-view and event timeline for a single session

tools.name: pirsch_compare
tools.description: Compare true period totals and visitor series between two time periods
